hero.title: Welcome to
hero.subtitle: Find out who doesn't follow you back. Upload your Instagram export, get the answer in seconds. Free, private, no account needed.

followers.label: followers.json
followers.hint: Click or drop your followers file here

following.label: following.json
following.hint: Click or drop your following file here

upload.instructionLink: How to export your Instagram data →

empty.notFollowingBack: Everyone you follow, follows you back 🎉
empty.notFollowedBack: You follow everyone who follows you

one.title: Get your data
one.description: Instagram → Settings → Your activity → Download your information. Choose JSON. It's a few clicks more than it should be — that part's on them.

two.title: Upload the files
two.description: Drop your followers and following files below. Everything runs in your browser. Nothing is uploaded, stored, or sent anywhere.

three.title: Get the results
three.description: See who doesn't follow back, who you don't follow back, and your mutuals. That's it.

footer.support: Folo is free and open source. No ads, no tracking, no catch. If it was useful, maybe consider buying me a coffee ☕
footer.privacy: 100% private — your data never leaves your browser

privacy.badge: Runs entirely in your browser — no data collected
